hero.subtitle: Stop using 3 different apps just to catch one train. RailMate gives you real schedules, real fares, and live delay reports from fellow travelers — all in one place. Free.

footer.data_notice: Schedule and fare data sourced from Bangladesh Railway official publications. Community reports are user-submitted. RailMate is not affiliated with Bangladesh Railway.
footer.copyright: © 2026 RailMate Bangladesh · Built By Najmul Hasan

about.title: About RailMate Bangladesh
about.mission_desc: To simplify and improve the Bangladesh Railway experience through unified, intelligent, community-powered tools — without replacing existing government services.
about.reliability_desc: We strive to provide the most accurate and up-to-date information possible through official data and community verification.
about.community_desc: RailMate is built for travelers, by travelers. We believe in the power of shared information to improve everyone's journey.
about.privacy_desc: Your data is yours. We collect only what's necessary to provide our service and never compromise your personal information.
about.vision: "RailMate Bangladesh is the most trusted railway companion app for Bangladeshi travelers — the app they open before, during, and after every train journey."
about.why_exists_p1: For years, Bangladeshi train travelers have navigated a fragmented landscape of information. Official schedules were often hard to find on mobile, real-time delay information was non-existent except at station platforms, and there was no unified way for passengers to help each other.
about.why_exists_p2: Existing apps often lacked a modern user experience, didn't support iOS, or didn't provide a community layer that reflected the real-time reality of the tracks. We saw a need for a new standard — a companion that feels like it belongs in 2025.
about.independent_platform: RailMate is an independent platform developed by Bangladeshi developers. It is not affiliated with Bangladesh Railway.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about RailMate Bangladesh.

questions.question: Is RailMate free to use?
questions.answer: Yes, the core app is completely free — schedules, fares, saved routes, community reports, and delay alerts are all free. We offer an optional RailMate+ premium subscription (৳99–299/month) for advanced features.

questions.question: How accurate is the schedule information?
questions.answer: Schedule data is sourced from Bangladesh Railway's official published timetables. We update it when official timetables change. Real-time accuracy depends on community reports — we recommend verifying against official sources for critical journeys.

questions.question: Does RailMate sell train tickets?
questions.answer: No. RailMate is an information and companion platform. For ticket purchases, we direct you to the official Rail Sheba platform (railshebashohoz.com) or the government e-ticketing portal.

questions.question: How do community reports work?
questions.answer: Any registered user can submit a delay, crowding, or condition report for any train. Reports are validated through a community upvote/confirm system. Reports with multiple confirmations are ranked higher.

questions.question: Is RailMate affiliated with Bangladesh Railway?
questions.answer: No. RailMate is an independent platform built by Bangladeshi developers. We use publicly available schedule data from Bangladesh Railway's official publications. We are not officially affiliated unless a formal partnership is announced.

problem.title: The Railway Problem in Bangladesh
problem.subtitle: Travelers are tired of fragmented information, inaccurate schedules, and zero live updates.

community.title: Community Powered Intelligence

download_page.meta_description: Download RailMate Bangladesh on Android. Available on Google Play and as a direct APK. iOS coming soon.
download_page.json_ld_description: Bangladesh's most trusted railway companion app.
download_page.title: Get RailMate on Your Device
download_page.subtitle: The most trusted railway companion for Bangladesh is available now on Android. iOS version is currently in development.
download_page.google_play_desc: Official Store — Recommended for auto-updates and security.

direct_apk.step1: Download the APK file to your device
direct_apk.step2: Enable 'Install from unknown sources' in Settings
direct_apk.step3: Tap the APK file to begin installation
direct_apk.step4: Done! Open RailMate from your app drawer

download_page.v1_release_notes: Initial public release featuring schedules, fares, and community reporting.

train_schedules.title: Train Schedules
train_schedules.body: Full timetables for all Bangladesh Railway intercity routes. Updated when BR updates. Always with last-verified date shown.

fare_calculator.title: Fare Calculator
fare_calculator.body: Exact fares for all 8 coach classes — Shovon to AC Berth. Pick your route, pick your class. No more PDF digging.

live_reports.title: Live Delay Reports
live_reports.body: Fellow travelers report delays, crowding, and coach conditions in real time. Know what's happening before you leave home.

alerts.title: Departure Alerts
alerts.body: Get a push notification before your train departs. Never miss your Dhaka–Chittagong express again.

offline.title: Offline Access
offline.body: Full schedule data cached on your device. Works in stations with no signal. Works on overnight journeys with no data.

localization.title: Bengali & English
localization.body: Station names, train names, all UI in both languages. Switch any time. Noto Sans Bengali for proper rendering.

metadata.title: RailMate Bangladesh — Travel Smarter. Travel RailMate.
metadata.description: Real train schedules, live delay reports, and fare calculator for Bangladesh Railway. Free. Bengali & English. Works offline.
